data.title: GREEN: Wire preconditions-record.sh into brainstorm SKILL.md with structural test
data.description:
Add preconditions-record.sh invocation to brainstorm SKILL.md at the brainstorm:complete transition point, plus a structural boundary test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add call to preconditions-record.sh in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md at the step where brainstorm:complete tag is applied to the epic
- [ ] Invocation passes: epic_id, gate_name=brainstorm_complete, session_id (from current session context), tier=minimal
- [ ] Add structural boundary test to tests/scripts/test-brainstorm-skill-phase1-gate.sh verifying preconditions-record.sh is referenced in brainstorm SKILL.md
- [ ] Structural test checks that the string 'preconditions-record.sh' appears in the SKILL.md file (boundary check only — not runtime behavior)

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (add preconditions-record.sh call)
- MODIFY: tests/scripts/test-brainstorm-skill-phase1-gate.sh (add structural boundary test)

## Testing Mode
GREEN — wires existing preconditions-record.sh into brainstorm workflow; structural test verifies the boundary

## Depends On
T4 (2018-40a6)
